    arxiv-daily

    Automated deployment @ 2025-04-05 21:14:00 Asia/Shanghai

    Welcome to contribute! Add your topics and keywords in topic.yml. You can also view historical data through the storage.

    Embodied Intelligence

    Embodied Intelligence

    Publish Date Title Authors PDF Code
    2025-04-03 On Vanishing Variance in Transformer Length Generalization Ruining Li et.al. 2504.02827v1 null

    2025-04-03 Do Two AI Scientists Agree? Xinghong Fu et.al. 2504.02822v1 null

    2025-04-03 Generative Evaluation of Complex Reasoning in Large Language Models Haowei Lin et.al. 2504.02810v1 null
    2025-04-03 MegaMath: Pushing the Limits of Open Math Corpora Fan Zhou et.al. 2504.02807v1 null

    2025-04-03 Spline-based Transformers Prashanth Chandran et.al. 2504.02797v1 null
    2025-04-03 Unified World Models: Coupling Video and Action Diffusion for Pretraining on Large Robotic Datasets Chuning Zhu et.al. 2504.02792v1 null

    2025-04-03 Towards Green AI-Native Networks: Evaluation of Neural Circuit Policy for Estimating Energy Consumption of Base Stations Selim Ickin et.al. 2504.02781v1 null
    2025-04-03 TailedCore: Few-Shot Sampling for Unsupervised Long-Tail Noisy Anomaly Detection Yoon Gyo Jung et.al. 2504.02775v1 null
    2025-04-03 How Deep Do Large Language Models Internalize Scientific Literature and Citation Practices? Andres Algaba et.al. 2504.02767v1 null
    2025-04-03 On Composable and Parametric Uncertainty in Systems Co-Design Yujun Huang et.al. 2504.02766v1 null
    2025-04-03 CanonNet: Canonical Ordering and Curvature Learning for Point Cloud Analysis Benjy Friedmann et.al. 2504.02763v1 null
    2025-04-03 Learning dynamics on the picosecond timescale in a superconducting synapse structure Ken Segall et.al. 2504.02754v1 null
    2025-04-03 Atrial constitutive neural networks Mathias Peirlinck et.al. 2504.02748v1 null
    2025-04-03 GEOPARD: Geometric Pretraining for Articulation Prediction in 3D Shapes Pradyumn Goyal et.al. 2504.02747v1 null

    2025-04-03 Pushing the Limit of PPG Sensing in Sedentary Conditions by Addressing Poor Skin-sensor Contact Manh Pham Hung et.al. 2504.02735v1 null
    2025-04-03 Why do LLMs attend to the first token? Federico Barbero et.al. 2504.02732v1 null
    2025-04-03 HQViT: Hybrid Quantum Vision Transformer for Image Classification Hui Zhang et.al. 2504.02730v1 null
    2025-04-03 Autonomous Human-Robot Interaction via Operator Imitation Sammy Christen et.al. 2504.02724v1 null
